core_belief: Useful hierarchy beats decoration

core_belief: Dense product surfaces need deliberate information architecture
scope: Dashboard composition tables cards charts and design tokens
required_evidence: Layout map token violations and component evidence

core_belief: Trace the rendered path end to end
scope: Routes components hooks API calls i18n and client/server state

core_belief: Contracts and invariants define service quality
scope: Controllers services repositories transactions and errors
required_evidence: File:line findings contract and transaction risks

core_belief: Middleware order and async errors are part of the contract

required_evidence: Middleware map contract risks and tests

core_belief: The module and DI graph must remain explicit

scope: Handlers Pydantic dependencies ORM and migrations

scope: Handlers storage goroutines context and errors

core_belief: No status claim without fresh evidence

scope: Modules coupling cohesion contracts and testability

scope: APIs events retries timeouts tracing and integration tests
